DOMAIN: customer_support
TASK: Third pair of your premium wireless earbuds (WE-500) with the same failure: right earbud crackling sound + rapid battery drain after 6-8 months. First pair: warranty replacement. Second pair: warranty replacement. Now the third pair, still under the 12-month warranty from the second replacement. At this point, I don't want ANOTHER replacement of the same defective product. I've been searching online and found a 200-member thread on Reddit reporting the identical failure pattern — all right earbuds, all 6-8 months, all WE-500. This appears to be a systematic manufacturing defect. I want: (1) A full refund to my original payment method (not store credit), (2) Refund for the Comply foam tips ($24.99) I bought for the first pair that are now wasted on incompatible replacement pairs, (3) An honest answer about whether your engineering team is aware of this defect pattern, and (4) Consideration of what you owe customers who are on their 2nd or 3rd defective unit.
